introSection: Wilde Beast is a wooden roller coaster located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Wilde Beast was one of four roller coasters which opened with Canada's Wonderland in 1981. In 1997, the name was changed to "Wild Beast". For the 2019 season, the name was changed back to "Wilde Beast". The attraction was one of several in the Medieval Faire area which had their original names reverted in 2019.

fullText:
Wilde Beast is a wooden roller coaster located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada.

Wilde Beast was one of four roller coasters which opened with Canada's Wonderland in 1981. In 1997, the name was changed to "Wild Beast". For the 2019 season, the name was changed back to "Wilde Beast". The attraction was one of several in the Medieval Faire area which had their original names reverted in 2019.
